backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix for the white screen runtime error by ensuring CartProvider wraps all CartContext consumers in App.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of every frontend source file, summarizing each component's purpose and key functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind layers and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and mobile optimization settings for the Healthy Yummy Bites restaurant site.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps AppContent in CartProvider; AppContent manages cart/checkout modal state and composes all page sections with CartIcon, CartPanel, and CheckoutModal.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying a business description paragraph and three feature cards (Fresh Ingredients, Made with Love, Great Taste) with glassmorphism styling and hover animations.
frontend/src/components/CartIcon.tsx: Fixed top-right cart button that reads totalItems from CartContext and displays a red badge count, with glassmorphism styling and a 48px touch target.
frontend/src/components/CartPanel.tsx: Slide-in cart drawer (bottom sheet on mobile, right panel on desktop) showing cart items with quantity controls and a place-order button, consuming CartContext for state.
frontend/src/components/CheckoutModal.ts: Checkout modal with a validated form collecting customer name, phone, and address, then calling onSubmit with the CustomerInfo payload to trigger WhatsApp order flow.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Displays a contact section with location, phone, hours, and WhatsApp ordering info as glass-styled cards, plus a Google Maps placeholder.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a dark footer with the restaurant name, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Shows a responsive image gallery grid of five food categories (burgers, pizza, shakes, wraps, fries) with hover overlay effects.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, restaurant branding, and buttons to order via WhatsApp or scroll to the menu.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Renders categorized menu items from menuData with add-to-cart buttons, supporting both single-price and dual-price (small/large) items with a brief visual confirmation state.
A bold call-to-action section with WhatsApp order and phone call buttons styled on an orange gradient background.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Displays three hardcoded customer reviews as five-star rated glass cards in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/StickyOrderButto: A mobile-only sticky WhatsApp order button that appears after scrolling 300px down the page.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for cart state management with add, remove, update, and clear operations, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/data/menuData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static data for all restaurant menu categories (shakes, mojito, coffee, burger, fries, salad, wraps, sandwich, pizza, spring roll) with names and prices.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a warm café color palette with OKLCH variables for light/dark modes, plus utility classes for glassmorphism, premium shadows, 3D depth effects, and button styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappOrder.ts: Utility that formats a cart order and customer details into a WhatsApp message URL targeting the restaurant's phone number (919023031429).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based custom colors (cream, orange, semantic tokens), custom border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the restaurant website's architecture, existing features, design system, WhatsApp ordering integration, and a known white-screen runtime bug in the cart system.
